Uses of Class
neqsim.process.safety.overpressure.ControlValveFailureRelief

Packages that use ControlValveFailureRelief
Package
Description
neqsim.process.safety.overpressure
 

  • Uses of ControlValveFailureRelief in neqsim.process.safety.overpressure

    Methods in neqsim.process.safety.overpressure that return ControlValveFailureRelief
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ControlValveFailureRelief
    ControlValveFailureRelief.setCv(double cv)
    Sets the valve flow coefficient Cv.
    ControlValveFailureRelief
    ControlValveFailureRelief.setCvErosionMargin(double cvErosionMargin)
    Sets a multiplier applied to Cv to account for trim erosion or vibration increasing the effective capacity per TR3001 SR-26501.
    ControlValveFailureRelief
    ControlValveFailureRelief.setDischargeCoefficient(double dischargeCoefficient)
    Sets the discharge coefficient applied to the effective area.
    ControlValveFailureRelief
    ControlValveFailureRelief.setDownstreamPressureBara(double downstreamPressureBara)
    Sets the downstream (protected, low-pressure) pressure.
    ControlValveFailureRelief
    ControlValveFailureRelief.setEffectiveAreaM2(double effectiveAreaM2)
    Sets the effective fail-open flow area directly.
    ControlValveFailureRelief
    ControlValveFailureRelief.setFluid(SystemInterface fluid)
    Sets the upstream gas fluid used to evaluate the relieving-fluid properties.
    ControlValveFailureRelief
    ControlValveFailureRelief.setMolarMassKgPerMol(double molarMassKgPerMol)
    Sets the gas molar mass to use when no fluid is supplied.
    ControlValveFailureRelief
    ControlValveFailureRelief.setName(String name)
    Sets the scenario name.
    ControlValveFailureRelief
    ControlValveFailureRelief.setSpecificHeatRatio(double specificHeatRatio)
    Sets the gas specific-heat ratio Cp/Cv to use when no fluid is supplied.
    ControlValveFailureRelief
    ControlValveFailureRelief.setUpstreamPressureBara(double upstreamPressureBara)
    Sets the upstream pressure, normally the maximum operating pressure of the source.
    ControlValveFailureRelief
    ControlValveFailureRelief.setUpstreamTemperatureC(double upstreamTemperatureC)
    Sets the upstream temperature.
